ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "household_income" TEXT /* Household income of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Census region of the respondent's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the respondent has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the Star Wars film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer(s) of the film */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Official rating of the film */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the film */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent providing the response */,
  "have_seen_films" TEXT /* Whether the respondent has seen any of the Star Wars films */,
  "fan_status" TEXT /* Self-identification as a fan of the franchise */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was taken */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film view record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that the respondent has seen */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was viewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film view record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the film view record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_views_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_views_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank given by the respondent to the film */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ranking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_rankings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_rankings_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_perceptions" (
  "perception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perception record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character being perceived */,
  "favorability" TEXT /* Respondent's favorability towards the character */,
  "perception_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the perception */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the perception record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the perception record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_perceptions_character_name FOREIGN KEY ("character_name") REFERENCES characters ("character_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_perceptions_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expanded_universe" (
  "eu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Expanded Universe record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "familiarity" TEXT /* Respondent's familiarity with the Expanded Universe */,
  "fan_status" TEXT /* Self-identification as a fan of the Expanded Universe */,
  "eu_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the respondent's knowledge of the Expanded Universe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the EU record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the EU record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expanded_universe_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_trek_fandom" (
  "fandom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Star Trek fandom record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "fandom_status" TEXT /* Respondent's identification as a fan of Star Trek */,
  "trek_familiarity" TEXT /* Respondent's familiarity with Star Trek */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fandom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fandom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fandom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_trek_fandom_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the character */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character view record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the respondent */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that the respondent views favorably */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was viewed favorably */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character view record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character view record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_views_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_views_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses_raw" (
  "raw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raw response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent associated with the response */,
  "raw_response" TEXT /* Raw text of the response */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the raw response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the raw response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raw_id")
)
